title: REPORT AN ISSUE - 211info
text: CITY OF ASHLAND REPORT AN ISSUE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides community members a service to report experiencing or witnessing a suspected city code violation such as an abandoned vehicle, graffiti, power outage or water leak, water system issue, or water quality concern, parking violation on public street, street maintenance or traffic concern, weed abatement issue, and illegal dumping. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm by appoitment only Email (541) 488-6002 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 488-6002 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website. Reports are made through SeeClickFix App/web portal. Reports are not monitored outside of business hours and generally resolved in 10 business days; however, some may take longer. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: City of Ashland Services: Abandoned Vehicle Reporting/Removal Electric Service Connection/Repair Graffiti Reporting Illegal Dumping Reporting Public Nuisance Reporting Street Maintenance Water Quality Assurance Water Service Connection/Repair Weed Abatement/Brush Control Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF ASHLAND If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
